status: experiment-design analysis, NOT evidence of deuteration; non-transferable rig analysis (SPEC 7.T5)
non_detection_sentence: No claim that deuteration is detected unless the model comparison genuinely discriminates it
verdict: INSUFFICIENTLY IDENTIFIABLE at current metadata: the model ratio band brackets the measured ratio from both sides (T4 verdict geometry-sufficient, low discriminating power). No claim that deuteration is detected unless the model comparison genuinely discriminates it.
grid_note: all bands computed on the ratified T2 grid (thickness 0.2-1.0 mm per-sample, spot 300-500 um, h_sub 1e2-1e5, k 0.1-1.0, mapping band) — Angus-pending unknowns SWEPT, never fixed

scenarios.name: baseline
scenarios.description: current metadata: thickness/spot/h_sub/k/mapping all swept (the T4 band)

scenarios.name: pin_thickness
scenarios.description: per-sample thickness MEASURED (Angus ask 1, top residual gap): band at each candidate (t_d14, t_h14) pair

scenarios.name: pin_spot
scenarios.description: spot diameter MEASURED (Angus ask 2): band at each candidate w

scenarios.name: narrow_h_sub_one_decade
scenarios.description: underside coupling narrowed to ONE decade (bond-line thickness + cement-k literature per plan §4.6, or remount empirics) — both samples in the same decade, per-sample value still free

scenarios.name: pin_k
scenarios.description: k_PTP pinned by an independent measurement (closes the §6T band): band at each candidate k

scenarios.name: pin_mapping
scenarios.description: square-to-disc mapping systematic resolved (shape metrology): band at each candidate factor

scenarios.name: pin_thickness_and_spot
scenarios.description: asks 1+2 both answered: thickness pair AND spot pinned

scenarios.name: all_metadata
scenarios.description: thickness + spot + one-decade h_sub + mapping resolved (k still banded): the realistic best case without new physics data

scenarios.name: m0_unconstrained_mounting
scenarios.description: per-sample h_sub free across the full decade prior — the honest M0 envelope while mounting is unconstrained (the T4 sweep shares h_sub by its committed convention; the glue confound is the orthogonal axis)

scenarios.name: m0_mounting_within_1_decade
scenarios.description: per-sample h_sub differing by <= 1 decade (remount empirics or bond-line metrology would deliver this)

matched_sample_analysis.reading: at FULLY matched geometry the residual band is glue asymmetry alone; remounting the SAME crystal n times converts the h_sub prior into a measured spread (the only way to shrink this band empirically), whereas a second unmatched d14/h14 pair adds a new ratio with its own unconstrained glue asymmetry and does NOT shrink it

power_grid.d6_note: D6 additionally requires >= 8 independent power points before ANY nonlinear power model is claimable
